channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us

item.title: What we know so far about the Antioch High School shooter
item.description: Solomon Henderson arrived at the school on a bus and is believed to have gone into the restroom and retrieved a pistol.
item.dc:creator: Alicia Patton, NewsNation

item.title: Experts worry that Trump's Jan. 6 pardons will legitimize political violence, embolden extremists
item.description: President Donald Trump's pardons of those convicted in the Jan. 6, 2021, attack on the U.S. Capitol and the rhetoric of retribution from some of those released this week is raising deep concern among attorneys, former federal investigators and experts who follow extremism.
item.dc:creator: Ali Swenson And Lindsay Whitehurst, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Virginia fugitive apprehended in Whitesboro, New York
item.description: Hasimba Brown is currently on Parole in the state of Virginia for a manslaughter conviction in the state of New York.
item.dc:creator: Josh McMullen, NewsNation

item.title: Illegal immigrant suspect in fatal hit-and-run arrested 800 miles from crime scene on bus headed to Mexico
item.description: U.S. Marshals have arrested Juan Jahaziel Saenz-Suarez, a 27-year-old Mexican national, in connection with a hit-and-run that killed two young women on Jan. 19.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: CNN is announcing layoffs as part of a further shift to digital business
item.description: CNN expects to lay off about 200 people as part of a restructuring announced on Thursday that pivots the news organization toward a more digitally oriented future.
item.dc:creator: DAVID BAUDER, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Costco stands by its DEI policies as other companies scale back
item.description: Costco is pushing back on a shareholder proposal that urges the wholesale club operator to conduct an evaluation of any business risks posed by its diversity, equity and inclusion practices. Investors were expected to vote on the recommendation during the company's annual meeting Thursday.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Jury convicts serial killer truck driver in 2007 murder
item.description: INDIANAPOLIS — It took a Marion Superior Court jury less than 90 minutes to convict a serial killer truck driver of the murder of an Indianapolis woman more than 17 years ago.
item.dc:creator: Russ McQuaid, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Border Patrol agent killed in Vermont worked at the Pentagon during 9/11, family says
item.description: A U.S. Border Patrol agent who was killed in Vermont during a traffic stop near the Canadian border was a military veteran who worked security duty at the Pentagon during the Sept. 11 attacks, his family said.
item.dc:creator: KATHY McCORMACK and STEVE KARNOWSKI, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Fire chief shot, killed after stopping to help driver who struck a deer in Alabama
item.description: “We lost one of our brothers, leaders, mentor, and family to a senseless tragedy,” Cauthen's colleagues wrote in a Facebook post.
item.dc:creator: Elizabeth White, Fox 5

item.title: Lynn Ban, star of Netflix reality show, dies at 52 after emergency surgery
item.description: Lynn Ban, who starred in Netflix's reality show "Bling Empire: New York," has died weeks after a skiing accident and emergency brain surgery.
item.dc:creator: Emily Smith, Fox 5

item.title: Texas man who tried to scam ex-US Rep. George Santos sentenced to 18 months in prison
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — A Texas man was sentenced to a year and a half in prison Wednesday over his effort to dupe George Santos out of nearly $1 million by offering to destroy evidence in the disgraced congressman’s corruption case.
item.dc:creator: JAKE OFFENHARTZ, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Teen fatally shoots 16-year-old girl, himself at Tennessee high school: police
item.description: A student is dead and another injured after a teen gunman opened fire at a Nashville area high school before turning the gun on himself, police say.
item.dc:creator: Brittney Baird, KRON4

item.title: Pentagon orders 1,500 troops to secure U.S.-Mexico border
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — The Pentagon will begin deploying as many as 1,500 active duty troops to help secure the southern border in the coming days, U.S.
item.dc:creator: LOLITA C. BALDOR and TARA COPP, Associated Press, KTLA 5

item.title: GOP congressman wants bishop 'added to deportation list' after Trump prayer service
item.description: Rep. Mike Collins heavily criticized statements made by the Right Rev. Mariann Budde on Tuesday at the inaugural prayer service held for President Trump.
item.dc:creator: Ashleigh Fields, WGN 9

item.title: Trump's immigration crackdown leaves some families weighing risk of sending kids to school
item.description: Fears intensified for some when the Trump administration announced Tuesday it would allow federal immigration agencies to make arrests at schools, churches and hospitals, ending a decades-old policy.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Trump orders FAA to terminate DEI hiring efforts
item.description: President Donald Trump on Tuesday issued an executive order directing the Federal Aviation Administration (FAA) to "return to non-discriminatory, merit-based hiring" and eliminate diversity, equity and inclusion (DEI) initiatives.
item.dc:creator: Ashleigh Fields, WGN 9

item.title: Republicans renew efforts to limit people in US illegally from census count
item.description: Republican efforts to exclude people in the U.S. illegally from numbers used to divvy up congressional seats among states have begun anew, with four Republican state attorneys general suing to alter the once-a-decade head count even before President Donald Trump’s second term in office began Monday.
item.dc:creator: MIKE SCHNEIDER, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Man arrested at Utah nursing home decades after Hawaii murder
item.description: A man was arrested at a Utah nursing home on suspicion of second-degree murder in connection to a decades-old case from Hawaii.
item.dc:creator: Nicole Napuunoa, ABC 4

item.title: Trump rolls back Biden directive to study methods of lowering prescription costs
item.description: Among the dozens of Biden-era executive orders he rescinded on day one, President Trump nixed one that aimed to explore new health care payment models that would lower prescription costs for Medicare and Medicaid beneficiaries.
item.dc:creator: Joseph Choi, WFLA, NBC

item.title: 11-year-old pulls ultra rare Paul Skenes rookie card, Pirates says massive trade deal stands
item.description: The card, which contains the "Debut Patch" worn by Paul Skenes, quickly became a highly-coveted item. After months of search, an 11-year-old has reportedly come up with it.
item.dc:creator: Will Conybeare, Fox 5

item.title: The ash left behind by the Los Angeles wildfires might be toxic, experts warn
item.description: Toni Boucher threw up the first time she saw the charred remains of her home and neighborhood after this month’s deadly Los Angeles-area wildfires. Now she wonders if it’s worth it to go back to sift through the ashes and try to find her grandmother’s wedding ring.
item.dc:creator: MELINA WALLING, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Trump's first day back in White House includes firings, infrastructure announcement
item.description: President Donald Trump is spending his first full day back in the White House meeting with congressional leaders, making an infrastructure announcement and demonstrating one of his favored expressions of power: firing people.
item.dc:creator: Michelle L. Price, ABC 4

item.title: Garth Hudson, The Band's last surviving member, dies at 87
item.description: Garth Hudson, the Band's virtuoso keyboardist and all-around musician who drew from a unique palette of sounds and styles to add a conversational touch to such rock standards as "Up on Cripple Creek," “The Weight” and "Rag Mama Rag," has died at age 87.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Why Richard Allen's attorneys say conviction should be vacated in Delphi murders case
item.description: DELPHI, Ind. – Attorneys for convicted Delphi murderer Richard Allen filed a flurry of documents this week suggesting their client’s murder conviction should be vacated.
item.dc:creator: Matt Adams, WGN 9

item.title: Border Patrol agent killed in Vermont
item.description: A U.S. Border Patrol agent was shot and killed in northern Vermont on Monday afternoon, the FBI said in a statement later that evening.
item.dc:creator: Sarah Fortinsky, WGN 9

item.title: Ohio State wins 1st national title since 2014, outlasting Notre Dame 34-23 in CFP championship game
item.description: Instead of crying over another collapse, Ohio State can celebrate another national title after holding off a Notre Dame comeback bid Monday night to walk away with a nailbiter of a 34-23 victory over the Fighting Irish.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Fire crews in Southern California quickly extinguish brush fires amid extreme fire weather
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Firefighters quickly extinguished several brush fires that erupted Monday in Southern California amid windy and dry conditions.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Ohio State VS. Notre Dame: Facts to know before the CFP Championship kickoff
item.description: The Buckeyes and Fighting Irish meet Monday night in the College Football Playoff national championship game at Mercedes-Benz Stadium in Atlanta.
item.dc:creator: Orri Benatar, ABC 4

item.title: Do US adults support Trump's Day 1 actions? Here's what polling shows
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — President Donald Trump 's second term began with efforts to deliver on key campaign promises, including his vows to crack down on immigration and restore “ energy dominance.
item.dc:creator: AMELIA THOMSON-DEVEAUX and LINLEY SANDERS, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Chicago police reminded they can't cooperate with deportations
item.description: CHICAGO — WGN Investigates has learned Chicago Police officers are being reminded about what they "can" and "can't" do if President Donald Trump's promised immigration raids happen. The directives went into effect in 2021 but have renewed importance this week.
item.dc:creator: Ben Bradley, WGN 9

item.title: Planters hiring latest class of 'Nutmobile' drivers
item.description: Mr. Peanut is hiring. Planters is ready to bring in the 2025 class of brand ambassadors and drivers of their 26-foot peanut on wheels, the Nutmobile.
item.dc:creator: Travis Schlepp, KTLA 5

item.title: Former Planned Parenthood president, women's rights activist Cecile Richards has died at 67
item.description: CONCORD, N.H. (AP) — Cecile Richards, a national leader for abortion access and women’s rights who led Planned Parenthood for 12 tumultuous years, has died. She was 67. Richards died Monday at home in New York “surrounded by family and her ever-loyal dog, Ollie,” her family said in a statement.
item.dc:creator: HOLLY RAMER, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: MLK Day at King's Atlanta congregation features daughter's warning about anti-woke rhetoric
item.description: ATLANTA (AP) — A massive 70-member choir belted out “Hallelujah” at a Martin Luther King Jr. Day service Monday at his former congregation in Atlanta, followed by a stern message from his youngest daughter warning against anti-woke rhetoric.
item.dc:creator: JEFF MARTIN and JEFFREY COLLINS, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Costco workers authorize nationwide strike
item.description: Thousands of Costco workers nationwide voted Sunday to authorize a strike if a contract is not reached by the end of the month.
item.dc:creator: Tony Kurzweil, ABC 4

item.title: Longtime Planned Parenthood head Cecile Richards dies at 67
item.description: Cecile Richards, the former president of Planned Parenthood, died at the age of 67 on Monday after a battle with cancer.
item.dc:creator: Sophia Vento, Fox 5

item.title: Melania Trump hat: What people had to say about Inauguration Day fashion
item.description: Of all the things that people could be talking about on Inauguration Day, it didn't take long for people to latch onto the attire of Melania Trump, with one point of discussion taking the lead: her hat.
item.dc:creator: Brian Farrell, Fox 5

item.title: Trump sworn in as 47th president, celebrates with supporters
item.description: On a frigid holiday Monday in Washington, D.C., Donald Trump took the oath of office for a second time to become the 47th president of the United States.
item.dc:creator: Alix Martichoux, ABC 4
